General.Name: Town Ray Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Town Ray Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, trades in, and sells electrothermic household appliances in Europe, Asia, the United States, and internationally. The company offers garment care appliances, such as steam generator irons, garment steamers, and steam irons; and cooking appliances, including coffee machines, steam cooking appliances, and other cooking appliances, as well as consumer electronics products, cleaning products, and air purifiers. It also holds properties. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong. Town Ray Holdings Limited operates as a subsidiary of Modern Expression Limited.
General.Address: Reason Group Tower, Kwai Chung, Hong Kong

3.Name: Mr. Wai Kwong  Chiu
